title: Tree Plantation Drive
description: Joined a community tree-plantation initiative aimed at increasing green cover in local neighbourhoods and raising awareness about environmental sustainability.

title: Breakfast Drive
description: Participated in a breakfast drive to support underprivileged communities, ensuring they have access to nutritious meals.

title: Education and Hygiene Kit Packaging
description: Assisted in packaging educational and hygiene kits for distribution to underprivileged communities.

title: Seed Ball Making
description: Participated in a seed ball making workshop to promote environmental conservation and sustainable gardening practices.

title: School Painting
description: Participated in a school painting initiative to enhance the learning environment and promote creativity among students.
